# Chapter 9: Optimisation in operation  (~100 pp)
- 9.1 LP/IP/MILP in operations (15) · 9.2 Network flow problems (15) · 9.3 Scheduling (15) · 9.4 Inventory control (15) · 9.5 Stochastic programming (12) · 9.6 Robust optimisation (15) · 9.7 Failure section: optimised systems with no slack and the cost when reality bit (13)

**Archetype**: optimisation, scaling. **Project**: solve a real scheduling problem (shifts, deliveries, batch jobs) with appropriate solver. **Exercises**: 30.
